settings.headline: Genuinely thicker hair after 12 weeks
settings.body: I'd given up. Started seeing baby hairs at week 6, real density by week 10. My hairdresser noticed before I told her. Worth every penny.
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.headline: Salon-quality skin from my sofa
settings.body: I was spending £80 a month on facials. The face mask paid for itself in the first month and my skin actually looks better than after treatments.
settings.name: Claire B.

settings.headline: Sleeping through the night for the first time in years
settings.body: 15 minutes before bed and I'm out. The warmth alone is calming, but something about it actually shifts my whole nervous system.
settings.name: James T.

settings.headline: The bundle is the move
settings.body: Bought all three after my friend wouldn't shut up about hers. Six weeks in: hair fuller, skin glowing, sleeping better. No regrets.
settings.name: Rachel T.

settings.headline: Skeptical husband, now uses it every day
settings.body: Bought the cap for him as a joke gift. Three months later he's the one reminding me to charge it. His hairline is genuinely filling in.
settings.name: Emma R.

settings.headline: Finally something that works
settings.body: I've tried every retinol, every serum, every viral tiktok product. This is the only thing that's made a visible difference to my fine lines. Eight weeks in.
settings.name: Priya S.

settings.headline: Worth it for the migraines alone
settings.body: I bought it for sleep but I've noticed my tension headaches are basically gone. The heat is so gentle, way better than a wheat bag.
settings.name: David L.

settings.headline: Better than the £400 clinic version
settings.body: I was about to book a course of red light at my dermatologist (£1,200 total). Tried the mask first. Saw the same results in month 2. Cancelled the booking.
settings.name: Sophie A.

settings.headline: Easy to actually use, that's the win
settings.body: I have a million skincare gadgets I never use. This one I actually do because it's literally just a cap. Wear while making coffee, done.
settings.name: Mark P.

settings.headline: Takes longer than I thought
settings.body: Don't expect overnight results. I was about to give up at week 4 but stuck with it. By week 10 the difference was undeniable. Patience pays off but the company should manage expectations better.
settings.name: Hannah K.

settings.headline: My only regret is not buying the bundle
settings.body: Bought the face mask, loved it, ordered the cap a month later, ordered the eye mask a month after that. Should have just bought the bundle and saved myself £40.
settings.name: Olivia W.

settings.headline: 60-day guarantee made me try it
settings.body: Wouldn't have risked £125 without the guarantee. Used it daily for 8 weeks, never even thought about returning. Skin is the best it's been in 10 years.
settings.name: Yasmin H.

settings.cta_heading: Want to share your Lumisca story?
settings.cta_body: Email us at hello@lumisca.co.uk and we'll send you 20% off your next order in exchange.
